name: Queso Fresco Tacos with Tomatillo Salsa
recipeIngredient: 4 serrano peppers, chopped (veined and seeded to your desired heat level)
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the husks from the tomatillos and dice them.
2. Mix diced tomatillos with finely chopped onions, minced garlic, lime juice, dried oregano, chopped serrano peppers (veined and seeded to your desired heat level), chopped cilantro, salt, and pepper to taste.
3. Cut the Queso Fresco into ½-inch pieces.
4. Place the cheese pieces on warm corn tortillas.
5. Top with the salsa.
